# PowerModifier.Index property

The modifier's slot index (the `N` in the sibling StringList's `Mod<N>_Name` label). Sparse — the engine skips unused slots (e.g. Blade Shift uses 0,1,2,3,5,7,9). Stable per build; the slot's group membership (mutual exclusivity) is a separate, not-yet-decoded field.

```csharp
public int Index { get; set; }
```
